title: upgrade API docs: restructure, code samples, beginner-friendly descriptions
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Docs you'll actually read
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the library. The API docs now have organized shelves, code samples you can copy, and a lot less clutter.
gist.summary: Complete overhaul of the API documentation structure, adding multi-language code samples and organized endpoint categories.
gist.impact: Developers get a much smoother experience with copy-pasteable examples and clearer navigation.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy library setting representing organized knowledge. The bee and robot are sorting books (endpoints) onto shelves.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and the robot in a warm library, organizing glowing books on lime green (#ecf874) shelves. The robot holds a scroll with code snippets. Soft lighting, studious atmosphere. Text in pixel font: 'DOCS'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
